calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-06-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Apr-22-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tina Paxton.
Brian Rossman, Esq. for Plaintiff T.C.B. Builders, Inc.
Plaintiff's witness, John Barnes, C.F.O., was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant: Margaret Massoud ind/dba Classic Touch Furniture Wholesale as follows:
Principal of $32,486.30
Attorney's fees of $2,850.00
Costs of $271.67
For the total of $35,607.97
Judgment signed in open court.
